_comment: Canonical single source for the OpenUPM scoped registry, PINNED comparison-benchmark package versions, and required Unity built-in module packages. Consumed by scripts/unity/run-ci-tests.ps1 (ephemeral manifest, comparison legs only via -IncludeComparisons), the committed .unity-test-project/Packages/manifest.json (local parity), and scripts/validate-comparison-packages.js (drift gate vs the comparison asmdef versionDefines and both manifests). Bump versions/modules HERE only; the validator fails if any consumer drifts. See .llm/skills/testing/comparison-parity-and-package-single-source.md.
